linear_recovery.label: Linear Recovery
linear_recovery.description: Scores rise steadily with limited fluctuation.

default_trace.label: Linear Recovery
default_trace.description: Scores rise steadily with limited fluctuation.

s_curve_recovery.label: S-Curve Recovery
s_curve_recovery.description: Progress is slow early, faster in the middle, and stabilizes late.

default_trace.label: S-Curve Recovery
default_trace.description: Progress is slow early, faster in the middle, and stabilizes late.

plateau.label: Plateau
plateau.description: Early improvement is followed by a plateau.

default_trace.description: Early improvement is followed by a plateau.

fatigue_dip.label: Fatigue Dip
fatigue_dip.description: A temporary fatigue dip interrupts recovery before later improvement.

default_trace.description: A temporary fatigue dip interrupts recovery before later improvement.
